Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Shieldon Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of December.
December 9: The featured Pokémon is Shieldon and the special bonus is 2× Catch XP.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Mienfoo Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of December.
December 16: The featured Pokémon is Mienfoo and the special bonus is 2× Catch Candy.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Spheal Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Tuesday during the month of December.
December 23: The featured Pokémon is Spheal and the special bonus is 2× Evolution XP.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Delibird Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:

December 30: The featured Pokémon is Delibird and the special bonus is 2× Catch Stardust.

Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Heatran will appear in Pokémon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Heatran!

- December 13 - December 14
- December 20 - December 21
- December 27 - December 28

City Safari.title: Sydney, Australia - Pokémon GO City Safari

bonuses: 1 additional Candy XL awarded for catching Pokémon in five-star raids and Mega Raids (Trainers level 31+)
1/2 Egg Hatch Distance
1/2 Stardust Cost for trades within the city
2× Hatch Candy
2× Hatch Stardust
2× Hatch XP
3 additional Candy awarded for catching Pokémon in five-star raids and Mega Raids
Additional 5,000 XP from completed raids
An increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon
Lure Modules (excluding Golden Lures) activated during the event will last for four hours
Lure Modules activated during the event will last for four hours
Trades will require 50% less Stardust
Up to 12 free Raid Passes per day by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
Up to five Special Trades can be made during the day on your ticket while in Sydney!
Up to five Special Trades daily within the city
Your buddy may find the City Safari–exclusive Tiny Compass souvenir

City Safari.description:
Pokémon GO City Safari is coming to Sydney, Australia, on December 13 and 14, 2025! Set off on a citywide adventure as you discover the vibrant stories, new friends, and exciting Pokémon waiting for you in Sydney!
Whether you’re a resident of Sydney or a first-time visitor, your Pokémon GO City Safari will take you across the city in an all-new way—from historic landmarks to local favorites, get ready for a taste of the city with Pokémon GO by your side!
One-day Tickets are AU$19 (including any applicable taxes and fees) on either December 13, 2025 or December 14, 2025, from 10 am to 6 pm AEDT.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition will run from December 9, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. to December 16, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Water-, Fighting-, and Dark-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.

GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Holiday Cup: Great League Edition will run from December 16, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. to December 23, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Normal-, Grass-, Electric-, Ice-, Flying-, and Ghost-type Pokémon are eligible.

bonuses: 1/2 Hatch Distance for Eggs placed in Incubators during the event
1/2 Stardust cost for trades
1/4 Egg Hatch Distance*
3 additional Candy XL for catching Pokémon in five-star and Mega raids (Trainers level 31+)
3× Hatch Candy
3× Hatch Stardust
3× Hatch XP
5,000 additional XP awarded for completed raids
6 additional Candy for catching Pokémon in five-star and Mega raids
Increased chance of 10 km Eggs from spinning PokéStops and Photo Discs at Gyms

Up to 18 daily Raid Passes per day from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
Up to 6 Special Trades can be made during your ticketed event day
Up to 9 daily Raid Passes per day from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Tainan Metropolitan Park, Tainan, Taiwan
Dates: February 20–22, 2026
Time: 9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. GMT+8
Ticket Price: NT $733 (Early Bird, regular $818) – Early Bird Discount available through December 31
Experience an exclusive in-person Pokémon GO event in Tainan! Inspired by a place where dreams and adventures begin, Pokémon GO Tour is bringing the Kalos region to life in Tainan. Embark on a journey of beauty and bonds as you collect Pokémon, discover legendary stories, and experience the community of Pokémon GO in-person.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Tainan Metropolitan Park during the date and time noted on your event ticket.
Other Event Locations:
- Los Angeles
- Tainan (this page)
- Global
Buy tickets: Pokémon GO Tour Website

Pokémon GO Tour.title: Mega Night at Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Tainan 2026

bonuses: 2× Candy for catching Pokémon
Additional 5,000 XP from completed raids
Chance of Mega Energy from spinning PokéStops and Photo Discs at Gyms

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Tainan Metropolitan Park, Tainan, Taiwan
Dates: February 20, 21, 22, 2026
Time: 5:00 p.m. – 7:00 p.m. GMT+8
Ticket Price: NT$529.00
An all-new nighttime celebration is coming to Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos!
Attendees may purchase this ticket as an addition to their primary Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Tainan ticket. Add-on tickets are NT$529.00 (or the equivalent pricing tier in your local currency, plus any applicable taxes and fees) and are available for purchase on the Pokémon GO Tour website. Event gameplay will be available only at the date, time, and location specified on your ticket.
Note: Tickets to this event are nonrefundable (subject to applicable law and the exceptions set forth in the Terms of Service). Tickets are first come, first served and are available for purchase while supplies last.
- Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos - Tainan 2026
It’s a night of fun, friends, and Pokémon adventures!
For the first time ever, we’re excited to offer a new nighttime event experience at Pokémon GO Tour, available to purchase as an add-on to your main event ticket. Mega Night is a ticketed evening event, taking place after the main daytime Pokémon GO Tour event.
Look forward to unique gameplay, special entertainment and more during this “after hours” extravaganza!
All event gameplay is exclusive to Mega Night ticket holders.
Please note: You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Tainan Metropolitan Park during the date and time noted on your add-on ticket.

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Location: Rose Bowl Stadium, Los Angeles, United States
Dates: February 20–22, 2026
Time: 9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. PST
Ticket Price: US $30.00 (Early Bird $25.00 through December 31) – Early Bird Discount available through December 31
Experience an exclusive in-person Pokémon GO event in Los Angeles! Inspired by a place where dreams and adventures begin, Pokémon GO Tour is bringing the Kalos region to life in Los Angeles. Embark on a journey of beauty and bonds as you collect Pokémon, discover legendary stories, and experience the community of Pokémon GO in-person.
All event gameplay is exclusive to ticket holders. You will only be able to experience the event gameplay within Rose Bowl Stadium during the date and time noted on your event ticket.
Other Event Locations:
- Los Angeles (this page)
- Tainan
- Global
Buy tickets: Pokémon GO Tour Website
Price:
- Regular: US $30.00
- Early Bird Special: US $25.00 (through December 31)
Note:
- Tickets are US $30.00 (or the equivalent pricing tier in your local currency, plus any applicable taxes and fees)
- Event gameplay is EXCLUSIVE to ticket holders
- Event gameplay only available within Rose Bowl Stadium during specified date and time
- Tickets are nonrefundable (subject to applicable law)
- First come, first served while supplies last
Tickets include one day of event gameplay. Attendees may purchase add-ons that extend citywide gameplay for an additional day.

For the first time ever, we’re excited to offer a new nighttime event experience at Pokémon GO Tour, available to purchase as an add-on to your main event ticket. Mega Night is a ticketed evening event, taking place after the main daytime Pokémon GO Tour event.

Mega-Evolved Pokémon will receive a CP boost
One GO Snapshot surprise event encounter per day—Latias may appear on Saturday and Latios may appear on Sunday!
Up to six Special Trades per day

Pokémon GO Tour.description:
Other Event Locations:
- Los Angeles
- Tainan
- Global (this page)
Buy tickets: Pokémon GO Web Store
Join millions of Trainers across the globe for Pokémon GO Tour: Kalos – Global! Take part in this worldwide event inspired by the Kalos region, first featured in Pokémon X and Pokémon Y on the Nintendo 3DS.
Get ready to experience new gameplay inspired by the stories and characters of Pokémon X and Pokémon Y. From longtime Kalos fans to new Trainers picking up Pokémon GO for the first time, anyone can take part in this exciting two-day event at no cost!
Looking to enhance your GO Tour adventure with exclusive Special Research, additional bonuses, and an increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon? Purchase a global event ticket from the Pokémon GO Web Store!

Season.title: Precious Paths

bonuses: Increased Stardust for the first catch of the day
Increased friendship bonus damage dealt by Pokémon in raids
One additional Special Trade per day

Season.description: Welcome to the next Pokémon GO Season: Precious Paths!
